title: Log Parameters Management in Hadoop MapReduce v2
description: The LogParams.java file in the Hadoop MapReduce v2 directory (v2) is responsible for managing log parameters. It encapsulates and stores crucial job identifiers such as container ID, application ID, node ID, and owner. The class uses simple data storage through private instance variables and provides getter/setter methods for these variables. Although it doesn't directly handle inputs or outputs, it stores parameters that are likely used elsewhere in the Hadoop MapReduce framework for logging or tracking purposes. This class is part of the Hadoop MapReduce v2 library, implying it collaborates with other components for managing logs or job-related information. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a mechanism for tracking and managing job-specific parameters, contributing to the overall logging and monitoring capabilities of the Hadoop MapReduce v2 framework.
